subject: Gaming
title: China's Gaming Restrictions
description: Learn China's Gaming Restrictions in one minute.

hook.text: China limited kids to three hours of gaming per week. The world's biggest market has the strictest rules.

buildup.text: Chinese regulators froze new game approvals in 2018. Thousands of companies lost their ability to release games.

discovery.text: Tencent—the world's largest game company—lost billions in value when regulations tightened.

twist.text: Despite restrictions, Chinese game companies dominate globally. Genshin Impact earned billions worldwide.

climax.text: China shows that government regulation can reshape an entire industry overnight—for better or worse.

punchline.text: Three hours per week for kids. The biggest market has the tightest grip.

quiz.question: How much gaming time does China allow for minors per week?
